name: fm-f5050-golden
description: Internal golden fixtures for Genoa's pinned §73.333 F(50,50) curve dataset + linear-log10 interpolation.  Each case asserts what the CURRENT engine + curve dataset must produce; a failure indicates engine drift, dataset corruption, or interpolation regression.  These are NOT FCC OET reference values — they pin engine consistency, NOT FCC compliance.  External FCC geo cross-check is a separate evidence channel (see fcc_geo_contour_crosscheck).

cases.label: KSLX-FM Class C, 100 kW, HAAT 561 m → 60 dBu service contour
KSLX-FM Class C, 100 kW, HAAT 561 m → 54 dBu city-grade contour
KSLX-FM Class C, 100 kW, HAAT 561 m → 40 dBu protected contour
